'''Ortolan''' was the native language of the [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orto/Legends|Orto]]. Most Ortolans were fluent in both Ortolan language and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language. Ortolan language was formed of grunts and hoots. Its word were formed of one hard syllable and one soft syllable.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}

==Glossary of terms==
*''Bajmo nean'' - You are not too smart
*''Dakoras'' - You are wise
*''Kodamoe'' - Hurry or waste no time
*''Majen va ts ras quee'' - Let's talk prices
*''Va rastne maj bajan quee'' - It took you long enough to get here!
*''Holaoey'' - No problem!

==Notable non-native speakers of Ortolan==
*[[Rystáll Sant/Legends|Rystáll Sant]]
